# 8. Work cooperatively

Theme: [Practise Effectively](theme-2-practise-effectively.md)

## To achieve this, you must:

- **8.1** Respect the skills, expertise and contributions of your colleagues
- **8.2** Maintain effective communication with colleagues
- **8.3** Keep colleagues informed when sharing the care of individuals
- **8.4** Work with colleagues to evaluate the quality of your work and that of the team
- **8.5** Work with colleagues to preserve the safety of those receiving care
- **8.6** Share information to identify and reduce risk
- **8.7** Be supportive of colleagues encountering health or performance problems

## Assessed through
- [Platform 5: Leading and managing nursing care and working in teams](../platforms/platform-5.md)
- [Platform 7: Coordinating care](../platforms/platform-7.md)
